chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-130 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-5590/ 2022 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on MA-713/ 2022 4. For hearing of main case. 19.04.2022. Petitioner in person. = 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Petitioner has attempted to exhaust a remedy by filing C.P.No.D-291 of 2010, he was one of the co-petitioner i.e. petitioner No.5 in the referred petition. The petition was withdrawn unconditionally and was dismissed as not pressed. Consequently, an order for not pressing the contempt application was passed with permission to file contempt application. The contempt application has also been dismissed accordingly. Thus, in view of the aforesaid orders this petition for the same / identical relief would not lie. In view of the bar on account of the above facts and circumstances, the petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
